subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I supplicate unto the Kingdom of Thy mercifulness, and humble myself before the might of Thy oneness, and am immersed in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اتضرع الی ملکوت رحمانیتک و اتذلل الی عزه فردانیتک و استغرق فی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for forgiveness, @martyrs and martyrdom
